posts.title: Sci-fi SUV Transform Sequence
posts.caption: Reactor reference sample. Futuristic vehicle transformation video prompt.
posts.prompt: Cinematic photoreal sci-fi action sequence on a sunny Los Angeles freeway. A white-and-orange futuristic armored SUV speeds through traffic under I-110 and I-105 freeway signs. It violently transforms mid-drive into a massive humanoid robot, panels splitting, wheels folding, mechanical limbs expanding, debris and dust exploding from cracked asphalt. The robot stomps through traffic, reveals a heavy rotating arm cannon in an extreme close-up, then fires with a huge muzzle flash. It immediately transforms again into a sleek white-and-orange fighter jet, twin engines igniting, launching upward over the Los Angeles skyline and firing a missile into the blue sky. Damaged freeway, dust clouds, broken pavement, realistic traffic, palm trees, Hollywood blockbuster VFX, dynamic camera, high-speed motion blur, realistic daylight, ultra-detailed mechanical design, continuous visual continuity.

posts.title: Yenarity Hotel Mood Starter
posts.caption: 예나리티 스타일을 테스트하기 위한 샘플 프롬프트.
posts.prompt: A refined Korean virtual lifestyle model with a short bob haircut in a quiet luxury hotel lobby, soft warm daylight, clean beige palette, editorial travel magazine mood, subtle confidence, modern cafe and boutique hotel aesthetic, realistic texture, elegant composition.
